subcodes.first_line: O God! Bestow Thy blessings upon Him of the Seven Letters, then upon the Letters of the First in earthly sovereignty and heavenly dominion. O God! Bestow Thy blessings upon Him of the Seven Letters, then upon the Letters of the First, in might and sovereign power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. اللهم صل علی ذات حروف السبع ثم حروف الاولی بالملک و الملکوت اللهم صل علی ذات حروف السبع ثم حروف الاولی بالعز والجبروت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
